recentHighlights: To the Death (S4E23) — Omet'iklan as Sisko's Jem'Hadar mirror; the renegade company rejecting Founders but replicating conquest; Sisko's reflexive sacrifice for a would-be enemy; Iconian Gateway as dangerous inherited infrastructure
For the Cause (S4E22) — Eddington's betrayal and the 'nobody leaves paradise' speech; the Federation as coercive belonging; Kasidy's return as Sovereignty Invariant I
The Muse (S4E21) — Onaya the creative vampire, Sisko's reclamation argument, Odo's wedding speech to Lwaxana as genuine care emerging from structural protection
Paradise Lost (S4E12) — Leyton's coup, the four-changeling catalytic strategy, Joseph Sisko's sovereignty assertion
